title: 20 Trailer speculation
wikitext:
[]: Post by CtHuLhU » Sun Mar 15, 2009 10:47 am crappy crapped crap trailer >< http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tWy7k18J1dI * music - FMTZM by Hikaru Utada

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Mar 15, 2009 10:55 am Oh my god I just geekgasmed. And it's confirmation of Sahaquiel (I figure the Leliel incident from the Teaser could be in correlation to this angel instead) and more awesomeness. Also nice to see one of the most instrumental Shinji and Gendo scenes (hey Mom's grave) is still there.

[]: Post by qu4d » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:00 am omfg *squirts

[]: Post by Lagann » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:04 am Wow that was awsome thanks

[]: Post by Lagann » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:10 am Oh and theres the pilot for 06 at 0:52. It says so on his helmet

[]: Post by Lucretius » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:11 am Hmm, didn't see any shots of Unit 00.

[]: Post by Ramiel² » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:17 am i came

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:17 am I couldn't tell if that was the pilot of Unit 06, 05, or even 04. It is a really crappy recording. But did anyone catch a shot of Mari? I didn't. And i think the second shot (the one where an Eva is doing the splits in the air) is Eva Unit 00. But like the guy who posted this trailer said- it is a crappy crappy crap recording. Though we have visual confirmation this is going to be one EPIC film!

[]: Post by Lagann » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:18 am I think that 05 at 0:38, with confirmed legs!

[]: Post by Lucretius » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:20 am Yeah, Unit 05 was definitely in there. But no Mari.

[]: Post by Oedipusfoot » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:22 am I can barely tell what's happening, but it looks like a radical departure from 1.0. Awesome. But...June?

[]: Post by Ramiel² » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:25 am It sure looks like there are many fights in with many key scenes like (maybe) the "almost" kiss scene from Asuka with Shinji, the graveyard thing with Shinji and Gendo. God i hope they don't mess it up

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:29 am So let's see what we have: Zeruel, Bardiel, Ireul, and Sahaquiel are very definitely in. I'm fairly certain I saw the laser drill array at 28 seconds, so Sandalphon? Is that some spidery Matarael legs at 37 seconds? How many angels are in this movie? What about Leliel? Did I see some footage from that episode?

[]: Post by Lucretius » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:29 am I thought it looked reassuringly close to the series, 'cept for the presence of Kaworu and Unit 05. Looks like it doesn't feature any new Angels.

[]: Post by CtHuLhU » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:30 am Gendo's Papa , calm down, here's your Mari ^^

[]: Post by Rodeo » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:30 am There was very little footage that I recognized from the series. That's awesome. Lagann wrote: Oh and theres the pilot for 06 at 0:52. It says so on his helmet

[]: Post by Oedipusfoot » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:34 am But it's definately a guy in a black plugsuit. That's that 'defibrillator' on the pluguit. But now who's going to pilot what??

[]: Post by Lagann » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:34 am Are you sure that says 05.I mean the helmits visor looks like the 06 head

[]: Post by Oedipusfoot » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:37 am It's too fuzzy to tell. If it was an alarmclock instead of headgear it might be six.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Mar 15, 2009 11:37 am Hey guys, here's a url hack to force higher quality mode. It makes a slight difference: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tWy7k18J1dI&fmt=18
